description_long: This is a blocky, modern-style chaise with a deep brown color, featuring a rectangular seat and three distinct backrest cushions. The armrests are thick and squared, matching the geometric aesthetic of the overall design. The backrest is segmented into three sections, each corresponding to a seat cushion, and the seat itself is wide enough to comfortably accommodate multiple people. The upholstery appears to be a solid color with subtle shading, suggesting a fabric or faux leather material. The base of the chaise is solid and boxy, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and sturdy appearance. The overall look is minimalist, with no visible decorative elements or patterns beyond the basic blocky form.
description: A blocky, deep brown chaise with three backrest cushions, thick squared armrests, and a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three segmented backrest cushions, wide seat, and both thick armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the solid base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back and the full width of the chaise.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other armrest and the depth of the seat.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, segmented into three rectangular sections, and extends the full width of the chaise. It is tall and blocky, with no visible curvature or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, thick, squared, and matching the height of the seat base.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs; the chaise has a solid, boxy base that extends to the floor, giving it a grounded appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid brown color with subtle shading, and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three large, attached backrest cushions and a single wide seat cushion, all integrated into the structure with no loose or layered cushions visible.
